title: ageratina diversipila
intro: Ageratina diversipila, also known as the Mexican shrub, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Ageratina diversipila include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and fighting against bacterial infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used to make a salve or tincture for topical application.
